# Nonpareil

**Galaxy Tool ID**: `toolshed.g2.bx.psu.edu/repos/iuc/nonpareil/nonpareil/3.1.1.1`
**Version**: 3.1.1.1
**Category**: Metagenomic Analysis

## Run via Galaxy Bridge

python galaxy_bridge.py --run toolshed.g2.bx.psu.edu/repos/iuc/nonpareil/nonpareil/3.1.1.1 --input <file> --output <dir>
